title: help I need to write a speech for my 9th grade english class on the characters of eva
display_title: help I need to write a speech for my 9th grade english class on the characters of eva
wikitext:
[]: help I need to write a speech for my 9th grade english class on the characters of eva Post by SpaceCowboy35 » Fri Jan 11, 2019 2:06 pm I'm not qualified to talk about this in a way where I don't discuss the importance of sex, violence, death to their characters

[]: Re: help I need to write a speech for my 9th grade english class on the characters of eva Post by The Eva Monkey » Fri Jan 11, 2019 10:51 pm Bro, abort, pick something else.

[]: Re: help I need to write a speech for my 9th grade english class on the characters of eva Post by Ambiant23 » Sat Jan 12, 2019 1:44 am Uh oh

[]: Re: help I need to write a speech for my 9th grade english class on the characters of eva Post by SpaceCowboy35 » Mon Jan 14, 2019 9:15 am fuck its due tomorrow

[]: Re: help I need to write a speech for my 9th grade english class on the characters of eva Post by Nerd King 101 » Mon Jan 14, 2019 6:32 pm SpaceCowboy35 wrote: fuck its due tomorrow

[]: Re: help I need to write a speech for my 9th grade english class on the characters of eva Post by Ambiant23 » Mon Jan 14, 2019 8:25 pm That's brilliant! Wait you are new.

[]: Re: help I need to write a speech for my 9th grade english class on the characters of eva Post by Nerd King 101 » Mon Jan 14, 2019 8:41 pm Ambiant23 wrote: That's brilliant! Wait you are new.

[]: Re: help I need to write a speech for my 9th grade english class on the characters of eva Post by SpaceCowboy35 » Tue Jan 15, 2019 7:31 am Nerd King 101 wrote: Ok what you gotta do is start a political debate as soon as you get to class. Your thoughts don't matter just get the teacher going and keep them going. If you're lucky they hate Trump and you can use the government shutdown to really get them ranting. As long as you waste enough class time that they won't have time to let you do the activity your good.

[]: Re: help I need to write a speech for my 9th grade english class on the characters of eva Post by SpaceCowboy35 » Tue Jan 15, 2019 7:32 am Update: I am going to deliver an analysis of Car Seat Headrest's How to Leave Town instead

[]: Re: help I need to write a speech for my 9th grade english class on the characters of eva Post by SpaceCowboy35 » Tue Jan 15, 2019 11:46 am Update again: had a panic attack in front of everyone because I was unprepared, nearly passed out

[]: Re: help I need to write a speech for my 9th grade english class on the characters of eva Post by The Eva Monkey » Tue Jan 15, 2019 12:36 pm To quote the great Hideaki Anno, "You're an idiot. Study harder." As someone who didn't take school seriously, and who now talks in front of an audience periodically, half of being successful at public speaking is a lot of preparation, the rest is just persistence and practice. You're going to have more assignments like this in the future, so put some concerted effort and preparation into it next time, and you'll do just fine. Public speaking is a really helpful skill to have in anyone's repertoire. But, more to the point, this topic has reached the end of its short and tumultuous existence.
